title: seg. fault and %Error: ...: Unsupported tristate port expression: CONST '1'h0'

features.name: tri0 net declaration on input port
features.description: Code should include a port declared as both input and tri0 net type

features.name: constant connected to tristate port in instance
features.description: Code should include an instance port connection where a constant value is passed to a tristate port

features.name: tri0 net type with pull-down semantics
features.description: Code should include a tri0 net declaration where the net has pull-down default behavior
